blocks.title: Who I Am
blocks.body: Full stack engineer with a systems mindset. I help teams turn complex product ideas into software people rely on.

blocks.title: Execution Style
blocks.body: I bring structure to ambiguity, align architecture with delivery, and keep communication clear from planning through release.

blocks.title: End-to-End Delivery
blocks.body: Across frontend, backend, and cloud, I focus on maintainability, observability, and stable releases under real production pressure.

blocks.title: Team Multiplication
blocks.body: I mentor engineers through architecture and debugging so teams move faster together, not just individually.

blocks.title: What I Am Looking For
blocks.body: I am looking for senior to lead-level full stack opportunities where I can own architecture, ship meaningful products, and grow strong engineering culture.

blocks.title: Principles
blocks.body: Clarity before cleverness. Reliability from day one. Product outcomes over buzzwords.

blocks.title: Let us Connect
blocks.body: If your team needs someone who can bridge product, architecture, and execution, I would love to talk.
